Instructions for overriding the `app_state` header in non-ARM code with faked headers.

# Purpose
The files in this directory override the `app_state` header used by `pbl_std.c`. The original header uses the reentry structure (`_reent`), which is not defined when compiling non-ARM code. These overrides replace the original header with custom headers that are compatible with non-ARM code by using faked headers.
